en: And Meryl Streep, you weren't always Meryl Streep.
ko: 메릴 스트립, 항상 메릴 스트립은 아니었잖아요. 뭐라고요?

en: What? Oh. LAUGHTER What do you mean?
Um, no, at birth, at birth, I had to be named Mary,
because my mother's name was Mary and her mother's name was Mary, and her mother's name was Mary.
I named my first daughter Mary.
I'm that way. What is that way?
Creature of habit? No, trying to fit in.
And make everybody happy in the family, basically.
So, um, yeah, but my mother's... What was the question?
You weren't Meryl. What is your name was the question.
LAUGHTER I know the answer. APPLAUSE
I was born Mary and Louise was my mother's best friend.
